title: Glaiden's forgotten items overhaul
description: A mod that gives more usage to items that don't have enough of them.
body:
Things that mod adds:
**Throwing knife**
weapon you can throw made of copper and amethyst
![throwing knife craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ebd6a76f8dcf1e636ac3aadacec849f746a746b.png)

**Barometre**
item that shows you your y coordinate
![Barometre craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce1f892162ae0180675294e21557da2bba655a10.png)

**Fried Dragon Egg**
infinite food source
![Fried Dragon Egg craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ef3d4fa685be1a794dd42a714138ab19c642279.png)

**Coordinator**
item that shows you your coordinates
![coordinator craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0feab4e704726b987e3f9896cf0cb5c50a5c3965.png)
